query:
INSERT INTO timeline_events (event_date, title, summary, case_number, category, status, public_status, issue_tags, story_id) VALUES
('2023-03-12', 'Declaration of probable cause and arrest', 'Washoe County Sheriff''s Office probable-cause materials identify Cameron Doyle Church as arrestee. Charges: Grand Larceny of a Motor Vehicle and failure-to-register. Confirmed by Master Evidence Index and local 03-12-23 probable-cause PDF.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["fourth_amendment_search_seizure"]', 60001),
('2023-03-17', 'Early case assignment request filed', 'Washoe County District Attorney''s office filed early case request and department assignment document for State v. Church. Confirmed by local 03-17-23 PDF and Master Evidence Index.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2023-03-20', 'Original criminal complaint filed (Reno Justice Court)', 'Reno Justice Court complaint charged Grand Larceny of a Motor Vehicle. DDA Dianne S. Drinkwater identified on complaint per Master Evidence Index.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2023-08-18', 'Amended complaint, preliminary-hearing waiver, and bindover', 'First amended complaint added Unlawful Taking of a Motor Vehicle. Waiver of preliminary examination entered. Bindover/Justice Court materials transferred matter to district court.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["due_process_defect"]', 60001),
('2023-09-01', 'Pretrial services court note — release condition issues', 'Pretrial court note documented release-condition issues and a failure-to-appear warrant per Case Exhibits spreadsheet and local 09-01-23 court-note files.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2023-09-08', 'District Court Information filed; second preliminary-examination waiver', 'State filed District Court Information in CR23-0657. Second preliminary-examination waiver appears in record set.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001),
('2023-09-12', 'Arraignment — not guilty plea; 60-day trial rule waived', 'Case exhibit data states Cameron Church pleaded not guilty, waived the 60-day trial rule, and had Cooper Brinson as appointed counsel.', 'CR23-0657', 'state_case', 'confirmed', 1, '["speedy_trial_delay"]', 60001),
('2023-10-09', 'Own-recognizance release revoked', 'Order Revoking Own Recognizance entered. Pretrial Services recommendation modified supervision after new arrest on October 8, 2023.', 'CR23-0657', 'custody', 'confirmed', 1, '[]', 60001);
